scripts.test:candidate-key: node --test drive/src/v2/candidateKey.test.js drive/src/v2/discoverTaxonomy.test.js drive/src/v2/discoverProbeEvidence.test.js drive/src/v2/discoverEvaluation.test.js drive/src/v2/discoverLifecycle.test.js drive/src/v2/discoverComposition.test.js drive/src/v2/discoverSufficiency.test.js drive/src/v2/datasetMeta.test.js drive/src/v2/liveIdentity.test.js drive/tests/discoverAdapters.test.mjs
